title: Agent Provider Malformed
objective: Prove OpenClaw handles malformed provider responses as contained agent failures without taking down the gateway.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before wiring the malformed mock provider.

phases.title: Malformed Provider Turn
phases.intent: Send a simple message that must fail because the provider returns malformed response payload.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/expect-command-fails.mjs -- ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-provider-malformed --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 60 --json

phases.title: Post-Failure Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the malformed provider response.
